title: Bedwars Datapack
description:
Tired Of Hardcoding Bedwars?
Download Our Datapack And Make Your Bedwars Server Easily
body:
# Bedwars Datapack

A Datapack Made By Arthur Yoshikasu Arakaki

This Adds Functions, And Some Advancements

**NOTE**: This Was Made To be Used **WITHOUT** The Vanilla(Built-In) Datapack

## Known Issues
+ Versions Below INDEV-v0.02 Must To Have The Vanilla Datapck Enabled Because it Can Cause Crashes

## Pros
+ Easy To Use
+ The Functions Name Says What They Do
+ Open Source

## Cons
+ It Says For Every User That Joins: "Welcome! You're In A Server That Uses ArthurArakaki's Bedwars Datapack"


## Compatibility

All Versions Have **THEORICAL** Support To 1.20

## Current State
The Current State Is INDEV

# Support

If you're having issues please ask in our [Github](https://github.com/DEM-Network-Corporation/bedwars/issues)
